user_prompt: there are two public calls that cause it to calculate:
* general disk size and free space stats
* use `cloud_history.txt` and file entries to figure out total files and un-uploaded files
for the getters for free space, also provide getters for it as a uint8_t as a percentage
agent_reply: Implemented `DiskStats` and wired it into the main info dialog.
- `.rec` file count, unuploaded `.rec` count, last upload timestamp, latest recorded file
- Upload detection uses `cloud_history.txt` success lines in the existing `path;YYYY/MM/DD-HH:MM:SS` format.
- `.rec` scanning recurses through the SD filesystem.
- `onclick_main_info()` now refreshes the stats and displays them via `show_info_dialog()` in [main.cpp](C:/GitHubRepos/The-Fly/src/main.cpp:155).

user_prompt: I want the following to be put in `lib\AudioFileRecorder\DiskStats.cpp`, which might seem unconventional, but because we are calling `refreshDiskSpace` so infrequently, I think it's the right move: I want it to draw a text on top of the top bar at the end of `refreshDiskSpace`, if the free disk space is less than 4 gigabytes, draw yellow colour `MEM`, less than 2 GB, draw a red `MEM FULL`, on the same line that the clock is on, starting from X=160, using the same font as the clock
wire `refreshDiskSpace` to the end of file write after the file is closed, and at the end of file pruning.
agent_reply: - [DiskStats.cpp](D:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/lib/AudioFileRecorder/DiskStats.cpp:408) now draws the top-bar disk warning after `refreshDiskSpace()`.
- Draws at `x=160`, same font/size as the clock.
- Added cached redraw via `DiskStats::drawDiskSpaceWarning()` so full top-bar redraws do not wipe it.
- [AudioFileRecorder.cpp](D:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/lib/AudioFileRecorder/AudioFileRecorder.cpp:526) refreshes disk space after the recording file is closed.
- [FileHistory.cpp](D:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/lib/AudioFileRecorder/FileHistory.cpp:175) refreshes disk space when pruning finishes.

commit_message: more gui work, auto bt reconnect
